abilities.name: hydration
abilities.shortEffect: Cures any major status ailment after each turn during rain.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon is cured of any major status ailment after each turn during rain.
abilities.flavorText: Cures the Pokémon's status conditions in rain.

abilities.name: sticky-hold
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents a held item from being removed by other Pokémon.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's hold item cannot be removed by other Pokémon. Damaging moves that would remove this Pokémon's item can still inflict damage against this Pokémon, e.g. Knock Off or Pluck. This Pokémon can still use moves that involve the loss of its own item, e.g. Fling or Trick. Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the encounter rate while fishing is increased.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's held items cling to its sticky body and cannot be removed by other Pokémon.

abilities.name: unburden
abilities.shortEffect: Doubles Speed upon using or losing a held item.
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon uses or loses its held item, its Speed is doubled. If it gains another item or leaves battle, this bonus is lost. This includes when the Pokémon drops its item because of Knock Off. This bonus does not count as a stat modifier. There is no notification when this ability takes effect.
abilities.flavorText: Boosts the Speed stat if the Pokémon's held item is used or lost.
